doctrine_decisions.D1_loop_engineering: cadence matrix H10 (Picard) / H1 (Book) / Daily (Squad B3), chaque tour append un episode calendar.md
doctrine_decisions.D2_book_role: H1 aggregator (pas coach direct), lit Picard H10 + Jerry Pulse + Summers Verse, produit fiche P&L, escalade si load=critical ou coherence=extractive
doctrine_decisions.D3_lighting_pattern: Jerry Pulse = source canonique lumieres L2, subset 4 indicateurs LD01-coaching (lights_project_count, lights_load_signal, lights_business_coherence, lights_calendar_dernier_episode), pointeur seul sur 30_Business_OS/00_Jerry_Business_Pulse/
doctrine_decisions.D4_append_only_strict: zéro mutation canon (A3_Book spec / BIBLIOGRAPHY / README / twins / agent files / calques)
doctrine_decisions.D5_d1_receipts: PowerShell script 4 Test-Path + 2 frontmatter + 1 grep + 1 JSON parse
doctrine_decisions.D6_yagni: pas de code TS, pas de mutation l2_mesh, pas de cron auto, pas de mutation twins, pas de materialisation runtime Lighting/fiches_p_and_l_weekly/, Summers twin verification reportee

sister_scope_next_iteration: materialisation runtime Lighting (Postgres l2_mesh.lights view ou equivalent)
